label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem step by step. So we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The initial setup is: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink ball Then there are a series of swaps. We need to track who ends up with which present after all the swaps. The question is asking what present Alice has at the end. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Alice and Dave swap. So after this, Alice would have Dave's original present (purple) and Dave would have Alice's original present (white). Let me note that: After first swap (Alice & Dave): - Alice: purple - Dave: white - Others remain the same (Bob: green, Claire: yellow, Eve: pink) Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. Now, Dave has white, and Claire has yellow. After swapping: - Claire gets white (from Dave) - Dave gets yellow
